summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard independently as requested. No shared canonical was selected, no security-sensitive items were detected in the hydrated artifact, and no close/merge/fix actions are safe or allowed for these open contributor PRs.

actions.reason: Useful focused PR with active contributor follow-up and validation signal; keep open for normal maintainer review outside this inventory shard.
Focused Matrix bug-fix PR with useful code and passing checks; not a duplicate or cleanup close candidate in this shard.
Ready-looking contributor PR with proof and useful focused code, but maintainer review is the remaining decision; keep open independently.
